tools.name: search
tools.description: ChatGPT-compatible read-only search alias. Returns MCP server results with id, title, and url.

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: ChatGPT-compatible read-only fetch alias. Returns a full MCP server item with id, title, text, url, and metadata.

tools.name: search_servers
tools.description: Search and rank MCP servers by capability, auth preference, client target, and risk tolerance.

tools.name: recommend_servers
tools.description: Recommend MCP servers for a plain-language task and return ranked matches with install config.

tools.name: get_server_report
tools.description: Return the full machine-readable verify report for a specific MCP server identifier.

tools.name: compare_servers
tools.description: Compare up to four MCP servers side by side across score, verdict, auth, tool count, prompts/resources, and freshness.

tools.name: route_task
tools.description: Choose the best MCP server/tools for a task. Use decide_agent_call when evaluating one specific attempted tool call.

tools.name: decide_agent_call
tools.description: Verify Gateway decision point. Decide whether this agent may call this tool, with this payload, for this user, right now. Writes an audit-ledger decision event.

tools.name: create_mandate
tools.description: Create a Verify Mandate: signed delegated authority for an agent/user/server scope, budget, validity window, and tool constraints.

tools.name: get_evidence_pack
tools.description: Return Verify Ledger evidence packs with invocations, hash-chained audit events, decisions, outcomes, mandates, and cost summaries.

tools.name: compile_docs
tools.description: Generate agent-readable MCP artifacts from product docs: server card, llms.txt, tool schemas, examples, policy metadata, score preview, and hosted docs page.

tools.name: export_policy
tools.description: Export a JSON TrustOps policy for one MCP server with allow, blocked tools, required scopes, freshness, and approval gates.

tools.name: get_subscription_options
tools.description: Return alert types, subscription channels, watch scopes, and existing subscription endpoints.

tools.name: get_gateway_options
tools.description: Return Verify Gateway semantics, /v1/route versus /v1/decide guidance, mandate inputs, ledger evidence hooks, and decision fields.

tools.name: get_hosting_options
tools.description: Return Verify Hosted MCP runtime/sandbox hosting capabilities, controls, and endpoints.

tools.name: list_agents
tools.description: Agent Sprawl Radar: list discovered AI agents, MCP servers, bots, workflows, risk levels, and owners.

tools.name: get_agent
tools.description: Agent Sprawl Radar: return one agent with tools, data access, findings, drift, and recommended action.

tools.name: score_agent
tools.description: Agent Sprawl Radar: score a normalized agent payload or an existing registry agent.

tools.name: explain_agent_risk
tools.description: Agent Sprawl Radar: explain risk findings and the recommended action for one registry agent.

tools.name: list_high_risk_agents
tools.description: Agent Sprawl Radar: list high and critical risk agents for review.

tools.name: get_drift_report
tools.description: Agent Sprawl Radar: return agent drift events across latest snapshots.

tools.name: generate_remediation_plan
tools.description: Agent Sprawl Radar: generate deterministic remediation steps for risky or drifting agents.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "fetch" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.
